cmd.serverin: Send a command to the server.

stdin.main: Execute a shell command in the server directory (outside the server process).
stdin.mk: Create or overwrite a file at the given path with the uploaded file, or create an empty file.
stdin.rm: Delete the file specified by the relative path from the server.
stdin.ls: List files in the specified relative path from the server.
stdin.mkdir: Create a new directory specified by the relative path from the server.
stdin.rmdir: Recursively delete the directory specified by the relative path from the server.
stdin.mv: Move the file specified by the path to another path.
stdin.wget: Download a file from a URL.

backup.create: Create a backup of the server data. Specify the destination path.
backup.apply: Apply a backup to the server.

command_description.ip: Display the server's IP address in Discord.
command_description.logs: Display server logs. If a file is specified, return that file. Otherwise, return the latest 10 logs.
command_description.help: Show links to this bot's documentation and web panel.

permission.view: Display the bot operation rights of the selected user.
permission.change: Modify the selected user's bot permissions.

command_description.lang: Change the bot's language. With an argument, specify the language code.
command_description.tokengen: Generate a token for login to the web.

terminal.set: Connect the server's console to a channel.
terminal.del: Disconnect the server's console from a channel.

command_description.update: Update the bot. This is a successor command of /replace.

announce.embed: Send text to discord with embed. Specify a md-formatted text file or a string as an argument.

command_description.status: Display the status of the process.

serverin.command: Command to send to the server

ls.file_path: Relative path of the directory to list

mk.file_path: Relative path of the file to create
mk.file: Attachment used as the file content (creates an empty file if omitted)

rm.file_path: Relative path of the file to delete

mkdir.dir_path: Relative path of the directory to create

rmdir.dir_path: Relative path of the directory to delete

mv.path: Relative path of the file or directory to move

send-discord.path: Relative path of the file to send

wget.path: Relative path to save the downloaded file

unzip.file_path: Relative path of the zip file to extract

apply.witch: Name of the backup to apply
apply.path: Relative path to apply the backup to (server root if omitted)

logs.filename: Log file name to display (shows the latest logs if omitted)

change.level: Permission level to set (0 to remove)

view.detail: Whether to also show availability of each command

set.channel: Channel to link the console to (current channel if omitted)

tokengen.level: Permission level of the generated token

update.is_force: Whether to force the update even if there are no changes

embed.file: Markdown-formatted text file containing the content to send

serverin.skipped_cmd: The command is not found or not allowed
serverin.unicode_encode_error: Failed to execute command due to UnicodeEncodeError(A character that is not included in the specified character code is used.)
serverin.timeout: The command was sent, but there was no response from the server

stdin.not_file_or_directory: `{}` is not a file or directory
stdin.permission_denied: `{}` cannot be modified because it is an important file
stdin.entry_file_locked: `{}` is the entry file and can only be modified when enable_advanced_features is enabled
stdin.file_size_limit:
Upload to File.io because the file size of `{}` is over the limit of {} bytes
mention to you if ended
stdin.file_size_limit_web: Cannot upload to File.io because the file size of `{}` is over the limit of {} bytes

mk.is_link: `{}` is a symbolic link and cannot be written
mk.is_directory: `{}` is a directory and cannot be written

ls.to_long: The content is over 2000 characters and will be converted to a file.

send-discord.send_capacity_error: <@{}> The file size of `{}` is over the limit of {} bytes and cannot be sent to discord

apply.protected_path: Cannot apply here — it collides with the protected file ({})

ip.not_allow: This command is denied by config

logs.cant_access_other_dir: Cannot access other directory. This operation will be logged.
logs.not_found: The specified file was not found. This operation will be logged.

change.already_added: The user has already been added as an administrator
change.already_removed: The user has already been removed as an administrator
change.invalid_level: Please specify an integer between 0 and {} for the permission level. (specified value : `{}`)

lang.restart_note: Restart the bot (/restart) to apply the change to command and argument descriptions

terminal.success: The terminal has been set to {}

update.same: The same version is already installed
update.different: The file id is different to update
update.force: update server.py because force option is true

embed.exist_file_and_txt: File and text cannot be written at the same time

send_help:
Details on the help can be found here
<https://sleeping-mikan.github.io/server-bot-docs/>
